stem: Triangle ABC and triangle DEF are such that AB/DE = BC/EF = CA/FD. If the measure of angle BAC is 35°, what is the measure, in degrees, of angle EDF?
rationale: The correct answer is 35. By the side-side-side (SSS) similarity criterion, having all three pairs of corresponding sides in the same ratio means triangle ABC is similar to triangle DEF. In similar triangles, corresponding angles are congruent. Since angle BAC corresponds to angle EDF, the two angles have equal measure, so m∠EDF = m∠BAC = 35.
